Localization.Description: A user performed an action with a section element or uploaded a file to a Captive Portal zone

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} added an element of section "{object.type}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} configured an element of section "{object.type}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} deleted an element of section "{object.type}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} added or changed an element of section "{object.type}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} changed an element of section "{object.type}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} uploaded a file to the Captive Portal zone on host {event_src.host}
